text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest, a big event where
the students do all sorts of things, from running
races to selling tasty treats, to delight their fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That includes Tosen Jordan. Seeing as she's
working so hard, I'm thinking of bringing her some
refreshments, when...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to bother you, but aren't you Tosen
Jordan's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind telling me in which competition
Jordan will be participating?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I have something I'd like to ask her, face-to-face.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Kay. Now don't touch your nails for another five minutes. They should be dry already, but better to be on the safe side.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Whoa... My nails are so beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Feels good, right? I recommend these 'cause
they're specifically for sports. I already told your
mom the brand.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Hey, Mom! She made my nails look really
cute!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Jordan! Thank you so much for helping out
again. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No worries! I love painting nails. Plus, it worked with my shift schedule. And it's nice and cool here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You really do an incredible job, though. I
think it's wonderful how you nurture the dreams
of kids who want to show off their colorful nails in
a race one day.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, don't stop there. Lay it on thick! Makes me
want to go the extra mile. ☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: There she is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan has volunteered to help out at an
event for health in kids' racing, organized by
members of the student health committee.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Trainer and... Ikuno? What's up? I don't see
you two together often.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Ah... That's true. Actually, I'm looking for Golshi.
She dragged Turbo off somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I talked with McQueen, and she thought she
might be here with you, Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Can everyone stop treating us like we're some
kind of package? That said, sorry, but I haven't
seen Golshi.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? Well, thank you for your help.
Though... I'm surprised.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: About?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That nail polish is not from a famous brand, but
it's good quality. My manicurist recommended it
to me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well... I do know my stuff when it comes to nails.
I've been buying nail products since way back.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's so kind of you to share that knowledge with
the next generation.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Now, I have to resume my search for Golshi... If
you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having arrived right at her break time, I join
Tosen Jordan for lunch.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Focusing really makes me hungry. Buy me something, Trainer!
choice_data_list: How did I know you'd say that?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yesss. It's because you get me. Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Man, there's so many people. I wonder what
they're all doing here.
choice_data_list:
It's a chance for them to see a different side of
you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you mean outside of racing? In that case, I
wish more of them would follow me on Umasta.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hang on... Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It is! Is she speaking to a fan? Wow, talk about a
rare sight. I wonder what she's doing.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I can't really see from here. This is gonna
bug me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I'm gonna head a bit closer.
Yaaahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! That sounds like...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
We found her, Golshi! It's Jordan, the evil
mastermind!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right, Golshi! Okay, Turbo! Show Jordan
that special skill of yours!

text_block_list.name: Turbo and Golshi
text_block_list.text: WhooOAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh, what the hell are you guys doing? And why
are you teaming up?! This isn't a race—it's the Fan
Fest!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Ah! There you are, Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...And Jordan?! This is good—with you on my side,
it's two-on-two!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Why am I getting dragged into this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her cry of protest falling on deaf ears, Tosen
Jordan finds herself in a battle against Gold Ship.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, lemme through. Move aside, please.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...I'll be counting on your support. And that other
thing.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: R-right! And one for my friend too!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're seriously engaging with your fans?
You?! Nakayama?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hm? Who said that? Oh, Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
We're at the Fan Fest, aren't we? I can at least
have a little chat with them.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Suuuure... But still, I can barely believe it.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'm not naive. You can't enter the Takarazuka
Kinen without being popular.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? The Takarazuka Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
No time to waste. While I've got you here, help
me out, Ms. Popular.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ms. Popular?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Is that the real live Jordan?! I-I... I've been
following you on Umasta since the Satsuki Sho!
You're sooo cool!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For real?! You follow me? Wow, thanks so
much! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: O-of course!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You wanna support me too, don'tcha? I'm one of
Jordan's Satsuki Sho pals.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Come on, I won't disappoint.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: The heck! Can you, like, not poach my fans, please?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Tosen Jordan and Nakayama Festa
continue mingling with the fans.
